_source: AI impact assessment tool v1.0 — Table 2 (Risk matrix). Transcribed verbatim from instrument/guidance/AI_impact_assessment_tool.md (§3, Table 2).
_note: This is the SINGLE source of truth for the deterministic rating engine (TECH_SPEC §10.1). matrix[consequence][likelihood] -> rating. FIDELITY WARNING: the real DTA Table 2 differs from the conventional 5x5 scaffold once shown in TECH_SPEC §10.1 — the rating set tops out at 'High' (there is NO 'Very high' tier), and several cells differ. Every cell below is read directly from the source table (oriented likelihood-rows x consequence-columns) and re-keyed consequence-first. A single wrong cell is a fidelity failure (TECH_SPEC §10.1 transcription note).
